task.summary: Record requirements and architecture discussion for authentication and role selection as an enabler for P1 ResearchOps tasks.
task.constraint: Do not change the live system, code, UI, D1 schema, Airtable schema or Cloudflare configuration at this time.

bundleZipInspection.inspectionBoundary: The connector exposes the ZIP as a binary repository object. The trace records path and blob presence, but does not claim internal ZIP entry review.

selectedBundles.reason: ResearchOps platform requirements and backlog dependency mapping.
P1 public-sector product risk, governance, safeguarding and assurance framing.
Account creation, sign-in, forms, content clarity, accessibility and permission-denied UI are in scope.
Cloudflare Access, Workers, D1, secrets, Turnstile and Cloudflare AI/Agents are in scope.
Airtable authorisation boundary and governed metadata mirroring are in scope.

skippedBundles.reason: No Mural OAuth, workspace, room, board, widget or sticky note implementation or requirements were in scope.

precedenceDecisions: GitHub Diamond governed branch hygiene, no force update, PR discipline and documentation-only scope control.
ResearchOps Developer governed repository context, backlog dependency mapping and documentation placement.
Gold Standard Gov Product Assistant governed public-sector product framing, P1 dependency treatment, governance and risk posture.
GOV.UK Design System governed account creation language, sign-in/sign-out UI, form clarity, accessibility and permission-denied patterns.
Cloudflare Core Developer governed Cloudflare Access, Workers, D1, secrets, Turnstile and Cloudflare AI/Agents framing.
Airtable Public API governed the boundary that Airtable remains a research data layer and not the primary authorisation engine.
Mural Public API was not activated because its domain was not in scope.

correctiveBranchBehaviour.reason: The branch was created from a commit that became behind current main before file changes.

cloudflareAgentBoundary: Cloudflare AI and Agents may support admin guidance, role explanation, audit summarisation or guided configuration. They must not make final access-control decisions; deterministic Worker and D1 logic must enforce permissions.
validationDesigned: review UI, Cloudflare, D1 and Airtable coverage
review implementation methods and capability matrix
residualRisks: Requirements need future validation before implementation.
Cloudflare and authentication product details should be checked again immediately before implementation.
No threat model has yet been completed.
No live IAM, D1, Airtable or Worker configuration has been changed.
No user research has validated the proposed role names or account flow.
